title: Umami Crispy Brazilian Pickle Bowl
description: A vegan-friendly, umami-rich dinner bowl featuring crispy Rice Krispies, tangy pickles, and bold Brazilian flavors. Perfect for a solo dinner, this dish combines crunchy textures with savory flavors.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together Rice Krispies, soy sauce, nutritional yeast, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Spread the Rice Krispies mixture on a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
While the Rice Krispies are baking, heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the pickle slices to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until caramelized and crispy.
In a small bowl, whisk together vegan mayo and a pinch of salt and pepper.
To assemble the bowl, place a scoop of crispy Rice Krispies at the bottom, followed by a few pickle slices, and a dollop of vegan mayo.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
